description: Directly translate the contents of the comic package and return the corresponding zip.
validate-if-a-local-file-or-remote-url-i: Validate if a local file or remote URL is a valid ZIP archive by checking magic number signature.
local-file-path-or-http-https-url-of-the: Local file path or HTTP/HTTPS URL of the file to validate. Supports file:// scheme, plain paths, and remote URLs.
true-if-the-file-has-valid-zip-signature: True if the file has valid ZIP signature (PK header), false otherwise. Uses magic number validation.
file-size-in-bytes-available-for-both-lo: File size in bytes. Available for both local files and remote URLs (if Content-Length header is present).
absolute-path-to-the-local-zip-file-only: Absolute path to the local ZIP file. Only returned when input is a valid local ZIP file path.
original-url-of-the-remote-zip-file-only: Original URL of the remote ZIP file. Only returned when input is a valid network ZIP URL.
submit-manga-zip-to-oomol-fusion-api-for: Submit manga ZIP to OOMOL Fusion API for text translation, poll for completion, and return translated ZIP URL.
publicly-accessible-url-of-the-manga-zip: Publicly accessible URL of the manga ZIP file to translate. Must be a valid HTTP/HTTPS URL pointing to a ZIP archive containing manga images.
target-language-for-manga-text-translati: Target language for manga text translation. Supports 26 languages including Chinese (Simplified/Traditional), Japanese, Korean, English, and European languages.
timeout-in-seconds-for-translation-task-: Timeout in seconds for translation task. Default: 1200s (20 minutes).
interval-in-seconds-between-status-check: Interval in seconds between status check requests during polling. Lower values provide faster feedback but increase API calls. Default: 5s.
maximum-number-of-retry-attempts-for-fai: Maximum number of retry attempts for failed HTTP requests. Applies to both task submission and status polling. Default: 3.
base-delay-in-seconds-between-retry-atte: Base delay in seconds between retry attempts. Actual delay increases exponentially with each retry. Default: 2s.
unique-identifier-for-the-submitted-tran: Unique identifier for the submitted translation task. Can be used to track or reference the task in subsequent operations.
download-url-of-the-translated-manga-zip: Download URL of the translated manga ZIP file. Only available when translation completes successfully. URL is time-limited and may expire.
total-number-of-pages-detected-in-the-ma: Total number of pages detected in the manga ZIP. Available during and after processing.
number-of-pages-successfully-translated-: Number of pages successfully translated so far. Useful for progress tracking during processing.
translates-text-in-manga-zip-archives-to: Translate the text from the comic ZIP archive into the target language. If it is a URL, a direct request will be made.
local-file-path-to-the-manga-zip-archive: Local file path to the manga ZIP archive. Use file picker widget to select a ZIP file containing manga images.
target-language-for-translation: Target language for translation. Supports 26 languages including Chinese, Japanese, Korean, English, and European languages.
download-url-of-the-translated-manga-zip: Download URL of the translated manga ZIP file. Only available when translation completes successfully. URL is time-limited.
oomol-studio-url-zip-translator: After uploading local files, translation is supported. This is suitable for use in oomol-studio. For web or other platforms, please use url-zip-translator.
